name: com.deucarian.template.game.survivors
description: Starter Unity game template for a Survivors-style horde roguelite loop built on Deucarian packages with local genre-kit adapters.

samples.description: A playable Survivors-style slice with top-down movement, radial enemy spawning, projectile/orbit/melee/burst/hitscan/payload weapons, XP gems, level-up choices, relic choices, class loadouts, class-gated upgrades, boss/victory flow, rewards, meta progression, persistence, and restart flow.
